'''Gary Howard Price''' (born 28 October 1969) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s, and [[Coach (sport)|coach]]ed in the 2000s. He played at representative level for [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]], and at club level for [[Wakefield Trinity]] (two spells) ([[Captain (sports)|captain]]), [[Featherstone Rovers]] (two spells), and [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]], as a {{rlp|wg|ce|pr|sr}}, or {{rlp|lf}}, and coached at club level for [[Wakefield Trinity]] (assistant), and [[Featherstone Rovers]].

==Playing career==
===Wakefield Trinity===
Price played {{rlp|sr}}, in [[Wakefield Trinity]]'s 8–11 defeat by [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] in the [[1990–91 Yorkshire Cup]] Final during the [[1990–91 Rugby Football League season|1990–91 season]] at [[Elland Road]], [[Leeds]] on Sunday 23 September 1990, and played {{rlp|sr}}, and scored a [[Try (rugby)|try]] in the 29–16 victory over [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[1992–93 Yorkshire Cup]] Final during the [[1992–93 Rugby Football League season|1992–93 season]] at [[Elland Road]], [[Leeds]] on Sunday 18 October 1992.<ref>Hoole, Les (2004). ''Wakefield Trinity RLFC – FIFTY GREAT GAMES''. Breedon Books. {{ISBN|1-85983-429-9}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers===
Price was signed by [[Featherstone Rovers]] in August 1993.<ref>{{cite web |title=Sporting Digest: Rugby League |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/sporting-digest-rugby-league-1462554.html?amp |website=The Independent |access-date=30 September 2022 |date=20 August 1993}}</ref> During his time at the club, he was usually referred to as "Gary H. Price" to avoid confusion with another [[Gary Price (rugby league, born 1961)|Gary Price]] who played for the club from 1989 to 1995.<ref>{{cite web |title=Rugby league |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/rugby-league-1594760.html |website=The Independent |access-date=30 September 2022 |date=3 August 1995}}</ref>

Price played {{rlp|sr}}, in [[Featherstone Rovers]]' 22–24 defeat by [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the 1998 [[Rugby Football League Championship Second Division|First Division]] Grand Final at [[Kirklees Stadium|McAlpine Stadium]], [[Huddersfield]] on 26 September 1998.<ref name="First Division Grand Final - 1998 - A Night To Remember!">{{cite web|url=http://www.btinternet.com/~Rovers/gpgg11.htm|title=First Division Grand Final – 1998 – A Night To Remember!|publisher=Great Players – Great Games|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20080725210743/http://www.btinternet.com/~rovers/gpgg11.htm|archivedate=25 July 2008|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

===International honours===
Gary Price won a [[Cap (sport)|cap]] for [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] while at Wakefield Trinity in 1991 as an [[Rugby league positions#Interchange|interchange]]/[[Substitution (sport)|substitute]] against Papua New Guinea.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/gary-h-price/summary.html|title=Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012}}</ref>
